description: Recruit speakers from the Chiang Mai nomad/founder community for weekly Thursday events. Personalize using nomad database profiles.
target_segment: Founders and digital nomads in CM with verifiable expertise (7-fig revenue, niche authority, or unique operational insight)

steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}} — I run a weekly founders event in Nimman (Thursdays, ~40 verified founders). We focus on actionable 20-min talks from people actually building here in CM.

Your work in {{business_niche}} is exactly the kind of thing our room would want to hear. Would you be open to presenting sometime in the next few weeks?

No slides required — just raw insight from what's working for you right now.

Just a quick follow-up, {{first_name}}. Our community is ~40 vetted founders/creators — the kind of people who actually act on what they hear.

We also clip every talk into short-form content for you to use. Zero extra effort on your end.

Still interested?

Last nudge, {{first_name}} — totally understand if timing's off.

If not now, happy to circle back when you're next in CM. Just reply with 'later' and I'll remove you from this thread.

sequences.name: Warm Speaker Invite (RSVP attendee or community member)

steps.subject: You should be presenting, not just attending
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

You've been a part of the CM Founders community for a while now — and based on what you've shared about {{business_niche}}, I genuinely think the room would benefit from hearing your perspective.

We do a 20-minute format: no slides required, just honest insight from someone operating at your level. The audience is ~40 curated founders, all vetted, all active.

We also produce a short-form content clip of your talk — fully edited, ready to post.

Want to claim a Thursday in the next 30 days?

Just reply and I'll send over the details.

steps.subject: Re: You should be presenting, not just attending
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}} — bumping this in case it got buried.

We have a spot open on [NEXT_THURSDAY_DATE] that would be perfect for someone covering {{business_niche}}.

Takes about 20 minutes to share what you know. You get a fully produced content clip from it. The audience is the kind of people who show up and actually do things.

Interested?

steps.subject: Closing the loop
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Not going to keep nudging — I know you're busy. If the timing just isn't right, totally fine.

If you'd ever want to speak at a future event, just reply and I'll put you on the list for next time you're ready.

Either way, hope to see you Thursday.

steps.subject: You're confirmed — Thursday [DATE] @ 6:30 PM
steps.body:
{{first_name}},

You're locked in. Here's everything you need:

**Date:** Thursday [DATE]
**Time:** Arrive by 6:00 PM, present at 6:30 PM
**Format:** 20-minute talk, no slides required (slides welcome if you want)
**Venue:** [VENUE_ADDRESS] (revealed to attendees day-of)

**What we handle:**
- Professional video recording
- Short-form content clips (we'll send within 48 hours)
- Intro/bio read to the room

**What we need from you:**
- Your talk title (1 line)
- A 2-sentence bio
- Headshot (optional)

Reply with those 3 things and you're all set.

See you Thursday.

steps.subject: Tomorrow — final details for your talk
steps.body:
Hey {{first_name}},

Just a reminder — your talk is tomorrow (Thursday) at 6:30 PM.

Venue: [VENUE_ADDRESS]
Arrive by: 6:00 PM

We'll handle setup and recording. Just show up ready to share.

If anything changes, reply here ASAP so we can adjust the lineup.

Looking forward to it.
